name: python3-ldap
title: python3-ldap
description:
LDAP interface module for Python3
This module provides a Python3 interface to the OpenLDAP client library
(LDAP is the Lightweight Directory Access Protocol).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ldap because LDAP interface module for Python3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ldap as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ldap with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ldap --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
